# alevelmathsonline.co.uk

Online A-level Maths and Further Maths revision courses. Small groups. Taught by Dr Anthony Korte (Oxford First, UCL MSc, Imperial College PhD).

alevelmathsonline.co.uk provides intensive online A-level Mathematics and Further Mathematics revision courses, taught in small groups via Zoom by Dr Anthony Korte. Dr Korte holds a First Class degree in Physics from Oxford, an MSc with Distinction in Mathematical Modelling from UCL, and a PhD in Theoretical Physics from Imperial College London. Courses cover Pure Mathematics, Statistics and Mechanics for A-level, and the full Further Mathematics syllabus, with support for all major UK exam boards: Edexcel, AQA, OCR A and OCR B. Intensive courses run at Easter, summer and Christmas.

## What this site covers

- Intensive online A-level Mathematics revision courses
- Intensive online A-level Further Mathematics revision courses
- Easter, summer and Christmas intensives
- Small group tuition via Zoom
- Pure Mathematics, Statistics and Mechanics
- Exam boards: Edexcel, AQA, OCR A, OCR B
- Year 12 and Year 13 students

## Tutor

Dr Anthony Korte — First Class degree in Physics (University of Oxford, ranked 2nd worldwide in entrance examinations), MSc with Distinction in Mathematical Modelling (UCL), PhD in Theoretical Physics (Imperial College London). Member of the Institute of Physics (MInstP).

## 2026 Course Dates

- Easter: 7–10 April 2026 (4-day); 7–8 April (Year 1, 2-day); 9–10 April (Year 2, 2-day)
- Summer: 23–24 August 2026 (Year 1, 2-day)
- Christmas: 30–31 December 2026 (Year 1 & 2)
- 1-to-1 tuition also available

## Pricing

- 4-day Easter course: £295
- 2-day courses: £165
- 1-day courses: £95

## Booking

Full course details, dates and booking at https://physicsandmathscourses.com/book-a-course/a-level-maths-revision-courses.html

## Related sites

- A-level Physics revision courses: https://physicscourses.co.uk
- ESAT & Oxford PAT preparation: https://oxfordpat.co.uk
